author: Zac Shenker
releaseNotes: Add verified fingerprints for both PS100 revisions (000C:0204:0002 original, 000C:0204:0003 v2) and auto-detect the variant by product ID. Revision-specific parameters (distance report on original; LED colors on v2) are shown only on the matching unit. Configure no longer overwrites factory defaults you have not changed.
